posts.author: stefano.monti (Stefano Monti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m using Monday more and more each day, and I can say it’s really beneficial to all my work. I would like first to continue using the free plan, for a later paid plan upgrade. I accept all the limitation to the free plan, one of such is the No-Private-Board limitation.

When i try to change my private board to main, i get the message that i have reached the free plan board limit. I have just one board, I don’t have boards in trash or archive. The current board has just one table in it.

Can you help me? Right now I cannot access my board and all my work is there now. I’m stuck.

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Stefano! I’ve sent you a message to gather more information so that I can look into this for you

posts.author: aitor (Aitor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! Same here. Any solution to this issue?
